name: eimi
description: 栄養素ベース献立提案アプリ

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w backend && npm run lint -w frontend
scripts.test:frontend: npm run test:frontend:nutrient && npm run test:frontend:recipe
scripts.test:unit: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e
